dialogos.texto_en: (It's been a few days...)
(Finally,\n it's the day of the graduation ceremony.)
*sigh*\nThe ceremony is over, and we have finally graduated.
What are you so sentimental about?\nYou haven't even received your diploma yet.
I'll definitely pass, so don't worry about it, okaaay!
As long as you don't fall asleep during the exam,\nyou should be able to make it.\nYou've been studying a lot.
Hehehe, it's nice to have your approval,\nFutaro-kun.
But I'm a little worried.\nYou seem to be getting busier and busier, Ichika.
That's true, we're counting on you.\nWe have a graduation trip waiting for us.
We really graduated, huh.\nI'm finally starting to realize it.
This is also thanks to you, Uesugi-san.\nThank you very much!
Thanks, Futaro.
Coming to this school...\nI'm glad I met you, Futaro.
Really, coming to this school...\nI'm glad I met you, Fu-kun.
Hey hey, don't talk like it's our last goodbye.
Right.\nThis is not a farewell, it's a new beginning.\nWe're leaving the nest, for a new place.
Before we leave, we have the graduation trip!\nI'm looking forward to it.
Yes, the graduation trip.\nLet's make lots of memories!
But first, the graduation trip... I'm excited.
Before starting our new lives,\nlet's make some memories!\nLet's have a great time on our graduation trip!
But, first is the graduation trip, right?\nI'm so excited for it!
Yeah!\nYou guys are gonna make all the plans, right?\nI'm excited to see if you can humor me!
I get how you feel and I can tell you're really looking \nforward to it.
Don't worry, leave it to us.\nI'm sure you'll be very happy with the outcome.
Yeah, I'm pretty confident.
Oh-ho, 'confident' you say?\nYou've got some guts to raise the bar like that.
I don't think the goal\nis to satisfy Futaro-kun specifically, is it?
No, it's not.\nThat's just what Uesugi-kun is like.
Heeey, Futaro!\nLet's take a commemorative photo!\nFutaro, the girls and Maruo, come over here!
We can hear you without the shouting.
Alright, let's go.
Yes, let's go.
